channel.title: ab on Nyo's Study Book
channel.description: Recent content in ab on Nyo's Study Book

item.title: 用 ab (apache benchmark) 測試網站效能
item.description: 指令說明: http://httpd.apache.org/docs/current/programs/ab.html 安裝 debian sudo apt-get install apache2-utils centos yum install httpd-tools 執行結果 $ ab -n 100 -c 10 https://google.com/ This is ApacheBench, Version 2.3 <$Revision: 1826891 $> Copyright 1996 Adam Twiss, Zeus Technology Ltd, http://www.zeustech.net/ Licensed to The Apache Software Foundation, http://www.apache.org/ Benchmarking google.com (be patient).....done Server Software: gws Server Hostname: google.com Server Port: 443 SSL/TLS Protocol: TLSv1.2,ECDHE-ECDSA-CHACHA20-POLY1305,256,256 TLS Server Name:
